concept: Repeatedly discard half the search space using a monotonic condition.
title: Index of target
statement: Given a sorted list, return the index of target or -1. Implement binary search manually.
constraints: Use Python 3 only.
Return the answer; do not print unless explicitly asked.
Handle empty and boundary cases where meaningful.
Write your own logic; do not call external libraries except collections, heapq, or math when appropriate.

solution_approach: Maintain inclusive left and right bounds. Move only after comparing nums[mid].
